---
name: Security report (read first)
about: Read SECURITY.md before opening this template
labels: security
---

**STOP.** Do not file a public security report through this form for any active vulnerability.

For vulnerability reports, follow the process in [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md):
- Open a private GitHub Security Advisory on the repo, OR
- Email security@pyra.dev (when available).

Public issues for non-vulnerability security topics (e.g., proposing a new defense layer, hardening guidance) are welcome here. Use this template only for those.
